parameters.content:
## ðŸ—ºï¸ Castor â€” Panel API (Postgres SQL puro)

Endpoints:
- `GET  /castor-panel-snapshot?userId=<uuid>` â†’ 1 query SQL agregando `castor_src_*`, `castor_metrics_*`, `castor_visita_feedback`, `castor_cnpj_cache`. Cache 5 min em `workflowStaticData`. **Sem parse de CSV em runtime.**
- `POST /castor-panel-route`    â†’ `{user_id, stops:[{cliente_codigo,lat,lng}], origin_lat?, origin_lng?, source?}` â†’ nearest-neighbor haversine + log em `castor_route_log`.
- `POST /castor-panel-feedback` â†’ `{user_id, cliente_codigo, outcome, custom_days?, notes?, idempotency_key?}` (RPC `castor_register_visit_feedback` com `SET LOCAL request.jwt.claim.sub`).
- `POST /castor-panel-cache-purge` â†’ invalida cache in-memory do workflow (chamado pelo Source-Manager apÃ³s cada ingest).

O front (`#routesPage`) consome SNAPSHOT e deriva `priority_rank`, `days_until_recall`, `elegivel_agora` clientside.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, data: $json.cached, error: null, cached: true } }}

parameters.query: SELECT to_jsonb(s.*) AS row FROM castor_user_scope(NULLIF('{{ $('Cache check').first().json.user_id }}','')::uuid) s;

WITH u AS (
  SELECT NULLIF('{{ $('Cache check').first().json.user_id }}','')::uuid AS uid
),
scope AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ $('Carry role').first().json.role }}'::TEXT AS role,
    NULLIF('{{ $('Carry role').first().json.vendor_code || '' }}','')::TEXT AS vendor_code,
    {{ $('Carry role').first().json.estados_sql }} AS estados,
    {{ $('Carry role').first().json.cidades_sql }} AS cidades
),
last_fb AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (cliente_codigo)
    cliente_codigo, outcome, visited_at, next_contact_at, notes
  FROM castor_visita_feedback
  ORDER BY cliente_codigo, visited_at DESC
),
clientes AS (
  -- Escopo do vendedor: por TERRITÃ“RIO (estados/cidades em raw_user_meta_data),
  -- nÃ£o por a1_vend. O vendedor enxerga TODOS os clientes da(s) UF(s)/cidade(s)
  -- a que tem acesso, esteja ele atribuÃ­do ou nÃ£o no Protheus. Fallback para
  -- vendor_code apenas quando o usuÃ¡rio ainda nÃ£o tem territÃ³rio cadastrado
  -- (legado / prÃ©-onboarding). Admin sempre vÃª tudo.
  SELECT
    m.cliente_codigo,
    m.a1_cod, m.a1_loja, m.a1_nome,
    NULL::text AS a1_nreduz, m.a1_cgc,
    m.a1_end, NULL::text AS a1_bairro,
    m.a1_mun, m.a1_est, m.a1_cep,
    NULL::text AS a1_ddd, NULL::text AS a1_tel, NULL::text AS a1_email,
    m.a1_vend, m.vendedor_nome,
    CASE
      WHEN m.elegivel_reativacao THEN '2'
      WHEN m.is_ativo_cadastro THEN '1'
      WHEN m.status_real = 'ATIVO' THEN '1'
      WHEN m.status_real = 'EM_RISCO' THEN '3'
      WHEN m.status_real IN ('REATIVAR','INATIVO','DORMENTE') THEN '2'
      ELSE '1'
    END AS a1_ustatus,
    m.status_real,
    m.status_cadastral,
    m.elegivel_reativacao,
    m.is_ativo_cadastro,
    m.ramo_codigo, m.ramo_desc,
    m.status_real AS status_inferido,
    m.faturamento_12m, m.pedidos_12m, m.ticket_medio_12m,
    m.faturamento_alltime, m.pedidos_alltime, m.ticket_medio_alltime,
    m.ultima_nota, m.ultimo_pedido, m.ultima_atividade,
    m.dias_sem_pedido, m.dias_sem_atividade,
    m.porte_efetivo, m.porte_origem, m.urgencia_score,
    to_jsonb(f.*) AS last_feedback
  FROM castor_client_metrics_v2 m
  CROSS JOIN scope s
  LEFT JOIN last_fb f ON f.cliente_codigo = m.cliente_codigo
  WHERE
    s.role = 'admin'
    OR (
      -- Tem territÃ³rio cadastrado â†’ usa SOMENTE territÃ³rio.
      (s.estados IS NOT NULL OR s.cidades IS NOT NULL)
      AND (s.estados IS NULL OR upper(coalesce(m.a1_est,'')) = ANY(s.estados))
      AND (s.cidades IS NULL OR upper(coalesce(m.a1_mun,'')) = ANY(s.cidades))
    )
    OR (
      -- Sem territÃ³rio MAS com vendor_code â†’ fallback legado por a1_vend.
      s.estados IS NULL AND s.cidades IS NULL
      AND s.vendor_code IS NOT NULL AND m.a1_vend = s.vendor_code
    )
    OR (
      -- Sem territÃ³rio E sem vendor_code â†’ vendedor SEM escopo configurado:
      -- mostra tudo (mesma polÃ­tica dos leads, que jÃ¡ liberam quando vendor_code Ã© NULL,
      -- e do fallback C do castor_admin_suggest_pool). Admin precisa cadastrar
      -- estados/cidades no metadata para restringir.
      s.estados IS NULL AND s.cidades IS NULL AND s.vendor_code IS NULL
    )
),
leads AS (
  SELECT
    z.za7_cliente AS za7_id,
    NULL::text AS za7_cnpj,
    z.za7_nome_cli AS za7_nome,
    z.za7_contato AS za7_tel,
    NULL::text AS za7_email,
    NULL::text AS za7_mun,
    NULL::text AS za7_est,
    z.za7_assunto AS za7_segmento,
    'lead' AS za7_status,
    z.za7_data, z.za7_vend
  FROM castor_src_za7010 z
  CROSS JOIN scope s
  WHERE z.za7_cliente IS NOT NULL AND z.za7_cliente <> ''
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM castor_src_sa1010 sa
       WHERE sa.a1_cod = z.za7_cliente OR sa.cliente_codigo LIKE z.za7_cliente || '%'
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM castor_metrics_alltime ma
       WHERE ma.cliente_codigo LIKE z.za7_cliente || '%'
    )
    AND (s.role = 'admin' OR s.vendor_code IS NULL OR z.za7_vend = s.vendor_code)
),
municipios AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    c.cc2_mun AS mun, c.cc2_est AS est,
    g.lat, g.lng
  FROM castor_src_cc2010 c
  LEFT JOIN castor_geocode_cache g
    ON g.scope = 'municipio'
   AND g.query_key = upper(c.cc2_mun) || '|' || upper(c.cc2_est)
   AND g.ok
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(c.*)) FROM clientes c)   AS clientes,
    (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(l.*)) FROM leads l)      AS leads,
    (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(m.*)) FROM municipios m) AS municipios,
    (SELECT CASE WHEN uid IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE castor_top_products(uid, 20, NULL) END FROM u) AS top_products,
    (SELECT CASE WHEN uid IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE castor_top_groups(uid, 20) END FROM u) AS top_groups,
    (SELECT CASE WHEN uid IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE castor_monthly_trend(uid, NULL, 24) END FROM u) AS sales_trend,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clientes) AS total_clientes,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clientes WHERE a1_ustatus = '2') AS total_inativos,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clientes WHERE a1_ustatus <> '2') AS total_ativos,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads) AS total_leads
)
SELECT to_jsonb(agg.*) AS row FROM agg;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: false, data: null, error: $json.error || 'invalid input' } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const r = $('Order Route').first().json;
return [{ json: { ok: true, data: { stops: r.stops, total_km: r.total_km, maps_url: r.maps_url }, error: null } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: false, data: null, error: $json.error || 'invalid input' } }}

parameters.jsCode:
try { const sd = $getWorkflowStaticData('global'); for (const k of Object.keys(sd)) { if (k.startsWith('snapshot_')) sd[k] = null; if (k.endsWith('_at')) sd[k] = 0; } } catch (e) {}
return [{ json: { ok: true, data: { purged: true }, error: null } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT castor_route_save_unified(
  '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid,
  {{ $json.name ? "'" + $json.name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.stops).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.total_km != null ? $json.total_km : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.origin_lat != null ? $json.origin_lat : 'NULL' }}::double precision,
  {{ $json.origin_lng != null ? $json.origin_lng : 'NULL' }}::double precision,
  {{ $json.ai_rationale ? "'" + $json.ai_rationale.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.maps_url ? "'" + $json.maps_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}
) AS result;
